evidence: TASK-040 (T3 -- coverage as an authored property, Option A) via the full canonical pipeline; the FGAP-033 coverage regression fix. Explore + orchestrator corroboration (parse_propose_domain_alignment / resolve / merge / _EMPTY_DRAFT / check_coverage / self_check signature + grounding pass-through). Plan ~/.claude/plans/covenant-authored-coverage.md. User confirmed Option A + the parser change (a DEC-41 departure from FEAT-008's zero-parser intent; the production prompt-template migration is a later bridge, NOT this task). IMPL b8430c7: parser parse_propose_domain_alignment accepts two OPTIONAL authored-gap keys learner_outcomes_not_addressed + areas_for_improvement_not_addressed (each {label, reason}; label catalogue-validated like the targeted path -- no fabrication; reason lenient; absent->[]; a label in BOTH targeted and not_addressed for one dimension RAISES); resolve_domain_alignment_vocab SKIPS the gap keys (no PK resolution -> production resolve/form path stays coherent); .workflows schema gains the two optional {label,reason} properties (the shared/schemas file named in the plan does not exist on disk -- the imperative parser IS the validator per DEC-41); _EMPTY_DRAFT.domain_alignment gains the two gap lists; snippet 02 gains the COVERAGE RULE (every learner outcome + area is targeted-with-rationale OR recorded in *_not_addressed with a reason) + the two output keys + two STRUCTURAL success_criteria coverage entries (+ its rendered .workshopping fragments re-stamped); self_check registers a structural `coverage` evaluator (universe from grounding[dimension]; passes iff universe subset of targeted+not_addressed; grounding-None/bad-dimension -> structural fail); check_draft check_coverage counts structured not_addressed rows as accounted_gaps (prose-mention demoted to fallback only). A SEPARATE rigorous adversarial audit verified ALL 5 criteria empirically against live Chiway grounding (7 learner outcomes + 7 areas): C1 the self-check runs on the merged draft BEFORE save (apply.py:478 before :491) and structural-fails (exit 3, no save, names the missing label) on a dropped area, passes when all accounted; C2 the gap is a discrete {label,reason} element the self-check reads structurally (not prose); C3 whole-draft check_coverage shows all areas accounted (targeted + accounted_gaps), zero remaining, zero prose mentions (the FGAP-033 scenario, closed); C4 same for learner outcomes; C5 fabricated gap label rejected identically to the targeted path, both-lists conflict raises, resolve does not choke, FULL project gate green (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy . [325 files] + pytest [3121 passed] + make test-js [48]), parity 14/14 + both cross-checks, distribution + review-cadence checks unmoved. Audit Total findings: 0 BLOCKERS. Advisories (non-blocking, recorded): (a) the gap `reason` prose is not free-text-scanned (only the targeted `rationale` is) -- an asymmetry / future-tightening note; (b) a PRE-EXISTING decompose.py reconstruction-gate drift on guiding_statements (snippets 1/3/4/5/7/10/13), byte-identical at the parent commit, unrelated to this change -> carried to TASK-042 (T5) transposition audit. Scope: planner/specs.py, .workflows schema, _workshop.py, snippet 02 + .workshopping fragments, self_check.py, check_draft.py, 3 test files (21 new tests).

criteria_results.criterion: During generation of the alignment/narrative step(s), the step's self-check fails when any improvement area in the school's universe is neither targeted nor recorded as an explicit gap, and passes when each is one or the other -- demonstrated on an input that would otherwise drop an area.
An acknowledged not-this-cycle gap is stored in the draft as a discrete recorded element (not only incidental prose), and the self-check reads that element -- demonstrated.

Over a full assembled draft, every improvement area in the school's universe is either targeted or recorded as an explicit gap (zero silently absent), confirmed by the whole-draft coverage check run over all specs combined.
Over the same draft, every learner outcome in the school's universe is targeted or recorded as an explicit gap.

On the same draft: outputs parse, the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection, the snippet-substrate parity gate passes 14/14, the project gate is green, and the distribution and review-cadence checks do not move from pass to fail.
